sentences.target: Je cherche la section jeunesse à la bibliothèque.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ la sɛk.sjɔ̃ ʒø.nɛs a la bi.bli.jɔ.tɛk/

translations.fr: Je cherche la section jeunesse à la bibliothèque.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ la sɛk.sjɔ̃ ʒø.nɛs a la bi.bli.jɔ.tɛk/
translations.en: I'm looking for the children's section at the library.
translations.es: Estoy buscando la sección infantil de la biblioteca.
translations.de: Ich suche die Kinderabteilung in der Bibliothek.
translations.it: Sto cercando la sezione ragazzi in biblioteca.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找图书馆的儿童区。
translations.yue: 我喺度搵圖書館嘅兒童區。
translations.ru: Я ищу детский отдел в библиотеке.
translations.pt: Estou procurando a seção infantil da biblioteca.
translations.he: אני מחפש את מחלקת הילדים בספרייה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm khu thiếu nhi trong thư viện.
translations.ar: أبحث عن قسم الأطفال في المكتبة.
translations.nl: Ik zoek de kinderafdeling in de bibliotheek.
translations.uk: Я шукаю дитячий відділ у бібліотеці.
translations.hi: मैं पुस्तकालय में बच्चों का अनुभाग ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω το παιδικό τμήμα στη βιβλιοθήκη.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter barneavdelingen på biblioteket.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari bagian anak-anak di perpustakaan.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter barnavdelningen på biblioteket.
translations.ro: Caut secția pentru copii la bibliotecă.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter børneafdelingen på biblioteket.
translations.ja: 図書館の児童コーナーを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite verb (present indicative, 1sg); transitive, taking a direct object NP.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘section’ marking definiteness.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the direct object NP.
Noun used post-nominally as a classifier/complement of the noun, specifying the type of section.
Preposition introducing a locative PP (‘à la bibliothèque’) modifying the verb.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘bibliothèque’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘à’ in the locative PP.

sentences.target: On se retrouve près de la section sport.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sə ʁə.tʁuv pʁɛ də la sɛk.sjɔ̃ spɔʁ/

translations.fr: On se retrouve près de la section sport.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sə ʁə.tʁuv pʁɛ də la sɛk.sjɔ̃ spɔʁ/
translations.en: Let's meet near the sports section.
translations.es: Quedemos cerca de la sección de deportes.
translations.de: Treffen wir uns in der Nähe der Sportabteilung.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在运动用品区附近见面吧。
translations.yue: 我哋喺運動用品區附近見面啦。
translations.ru: Давай встретимся рядом с отделом спорттоваров.
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar perto da seção de esportes.
translations.vi: Mình gặp nhau gần khu thể thao nhé.
translations.nl: Laten we afspreken bij de sportafdeling.
translations.hi: चलो खेल अनुभाग के पास मिलते हैं.
translations.el: Ας συναντηθούμε κοντά στο τμήμα αθλητικών.
translations.id: Mari bertemu di dekat bagian olahraga.
translations.ro: Hai să ne vedem lângă raionul de sport.
translations.ja: スポーツ売り場の近くで会おう。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; controls 3sg verb agreement.
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun; part of the pronominal verb ‘se retrouver’.
Finite verb (present indicative, 3sg with ‘on’); denotes the action of meeting.
Adverb forming a fixed locution ‘près de’ meaning ‘near’; modifies location.
Preposition completing ‘près’ to form ‘près de’; introduces the NP complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘section’.
Common noun; head of the NP governed by ‘de’.
Noun used as a classifier/complement of ‘section’, specifying its domain.

sentences.target: Va dans la section Aide, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /va dɑ̃ la sɛk.sjɔ̃ ɛd sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Va dans la section Aide, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /va dɑ̃ la sɛk.sjɔ̃ ɛd sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Go to the Help section, please.
translations.es: Ve a la sección de Ayuda, por favor.
translations.it: Vai alla sezione Aiuto, per favore.
translations.pt: Vá para a seção Ajuda, por favor.
translations.vi: Vui lòng vào mục Trợ giúp.
translations.ar: اذهب إلى قسم المساعدة، من فضلك.
translations.uk: Перейди, будь ласка, до розділу Допомога.
translations.el: Πήγαινε στην ενότητα Βοήθεια, σε παρακαλώ.
translations.nb: Gå til Hjelp-seksjonen, vær så snill.
translations.ro: Te rog, mergi la secțiunea Ajutor.
translations.ja: ヘルプセクションに行ってください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2sg; direct command addressed to ‘tu’ (implied).
Preposition marking goal/location; introduces the NP ‘la section Aide’.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘section’.
Common noun; head of the NP complement of ‘dans’.
Proper-noun label (section name); post-nominal identifier specifying which section.
Elided subordinating conjunction ‘si’ before vowel (‘s’il’); part of the polite formula.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; subject of ‘plaît’ in the formula.
2nd person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object/dative) with ‘plaire’.
Finite verb (present indicative, 3sg); in ‘s’il te plaît’, forms the idiomatic polite request.

sentences.target: La section maternité est au troisième étage.

translations.fr: La section maternité est au troisième étage.
translations.en: The maternity section is on the third floor.
translations.es: La sección de maternidad está en el tercer piso.
translations.de: Die Umstandsabteilung ist im dritten Stock.
translations.it: Il reparto premaman è al terzo piano.
translations.ru: Отдел товаров для беременных находится на третьем этаже.
translations.pt: A seção de maternidade fica no terceiro andar.
translations.vi: Khu đồ bầu ở tầng ba.
translations.nl: De zwangerschapsafdeling is op de derde verdieping.
translations.uk: Відділ для вагітних знаходиться на третьому поверсі.
translations.hu: A kismamarészleg a harmadik emeleten van.
translations.hi: मातृत्व अनुभाग तीसरी मंजिल पर है.
translations.pl: Dział ciążowy jest na trzecim piętrze.
translations.el: Το τμήμα εγκυμοσύνης είναι στον τρίτο όροφο.
translations.id: Bagian maternitas ada di lantai tiga.
translations.ro: Secția pentru gravide este la etajul trei.
translations.cs: Oddělení pro těhotné je ve třetím patře.
translations.ja: マタニティ売り場は3階にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Noun used post-nominally as a classifier/complement specifying the type of section.
Copular verb (present indicative, 3sg); links the subject to a locative predicate.
Preposition: contraction of ‘à le’; introduces the locative PP ‘au troisième étage’.
Ordinal adjective modifying ‘étage’.
Common noun; head of the PP complement to ‘au’.

La section maternité est au troisième étage.
